title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 33.420 - Endorsement of duplicate bonds
text:
33.420.  Endorsement of duplicate bonds. — Said duplicate bonds or coupons shall be endorsed, when registered, and before the delivery, as follows:
(RSMo 1939 § 13078, A.L. 1945 p. 1428 § 96) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11461; 1919 § 13367; 1909 § 11868
